variants: Laiwen Tang holds a professional license as an Ion Storm Technician, equipping her with the skills necessary to manage severe weather events. Her expertise lies in the field of Meteorology, nurtured under the mentorship of Andras Novak who has profoundly influenced her career. In addition to her technical credentials, she is also an engaged member of the Mossveil Entomology Circle, where she examines the interactions between weather phenomena and insect behavior. The Yearling Roots Circle serves as her primary funding source, allowing her to delve into research that enriches the understanding of this interplay between meteorology and entomology.
